title: Update Website Name to SPORTS MANAGEMENT HUB

requirements.summary: Update the website name displayed in the header from 'Sports Academy Finder' to 'SPORTS MANAGEMENT HUB'
acceptanceCriteria: The header displays 'SPORTS MANAGEMENT HUB' as the website name
The text is visible in the specified header location
The change applies to both desktop and mobile views

file_operations.description: Update the website name text in the header component from 'Sports Academy Finder' to 'SPORTS MANAGEMENT HUB'. Locate the span element containing the current website name and replace it with the new text. Ensure the change is visible in both the desktop navigation and mobile sheet menu views.
